result: I would give every child born tomorrow the same starting line—same calories, same books, same shots, same safety, same signal to their neurons that the world expects them to thrive. Nothing else we do levels the playing field faster or ripples farther; every cure, symphony, or breakthrough idea we never got is sitting in a brain that was told too early it wasn’t worth feeding.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
